original_hypothesis.title: PairFactory setGenesisStatus Missing isPair Validation Allows Genesis Flag on Arbitrary Addresses
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: setGenesisStatus allows genesisManager or feeManager to set isGenesis[_pair] = true for ANY address, unlike setIsGenesis which validates isPair[_pairAddress]. RouterV2's getAmountOut skips pairs where isGenesis returns true, and addLiquidity blocks initial deposits to genesis pairs. Setting isGenesis on a legitimate non-genesis pair would block its swap routing and initial liquidity, effectively DoSing that pair's functionality.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The missing isPair validation in setGenesisStatus creates an asymmetry with setIsGenesis. A compromised or careless genesisManager could mark active pairs as genesis, disrupting routing and liquidity operations.

proof_of_signal.pattern: function setGenesisStatus(address _pair, bool status) — no require(isPair[_pair]) unlike setIsGenesis which has require(isPair[_pairAddress])

preconditions: Attacker has genesisManager or feeManager role
Target pair is actively used for trading

initial_economic_evidence.manipulation_vector: Set genesis status on active pair to disable its routing in RouterV2.getAmountOut
initial_economic_evidence.profit_hypothesis: DoS on specific pairs; redirect trading volume to attacker-favored pairs

economic_questions: Who holds genesisManager role and how is it protected?
What downstream effects does isGenesis=true have on active pairs?
Can this be used to create arbitrage opportunities by disabling specific routing paths?
validation_requirements: Call setGenesisStatus on active pair and verify routing impact
Test RouterV2.getAmountOut behavior for genesis-flagged pairs
Verify addLiquidity blocking for genesis-flagged pairs

preliminary_attack_economics.potential_profit_range: Indirect; DoS on specific pairs redirecting volume

market_conditions_analysis.optimal_timing: During high-volume period for maximum disruption

potential_victim_impact.direct_victims: LPs and traders on the affected pair
potential_victim_impact.estimated_impact_per_user: Inability to trade or add liquidity
potential_victim_impact.total_value_at_risk: Trading volume and LP yields on affected pair

investigation_priorities.calculation_validation: Verify isGenesis effect on getAmountOut and addLiquidity

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
